# NFC Emulator — Master Key Dictionary
# Comprehensive collection from MCT, Flipper Zero, Proxmark3, and community sources
# Format: one key per line, 12 hex chars, no spaces
# Lines starting with # are comments

# Factory defaults
FFFFFFFFFFFF
A0A1A2A3A4A5
B0B1B2B3B4B5
D3F7D3F7D3F7
000000000000
